title: Smaller Swords By AhoorShr
description: Minecraft short swords for better PVP
body:
# **Minecraft short swords for PVP**

This Resource Pack helps you to have better PVP and fight experience.

This resource pack makes these swords short:

Wooden Sword

Stone Sword

Iron Sword

Diamond Sword

Copper Sword

Golden Sword

Netherite Sword
